intent_summary: Phase 5.8 case_002: python-semver commit 0309c63 ('Fix #291: Disallow negative numbers in VersionInfo (#292)'). The change makes VersionInfo reject negative major/minor/patch inputs and adds regression tests at root-level test_semver.py. Verifier should ground a 'regression coverage exists and passes at this commit' claim against pytest evidence scoped to that file.

evidence_items.summary: python-semver upstream commit 0309c63ce834b7d35aa3e29b8d5bb0357532b016 lands PR #292 ('Fix #291: Disallow negative numbers in VersionInfo'). Touches semver.py (VersionInfo constructor: ValueError on negative major/minor/patch) and root-level test_semver.py (new regression tests pinning the negative-input rejection).

Operator intent (cgpro session unslop-md): small hermetic Python repo with one narrow contract (VersionInfo constructor) and a known bug pinned by a fail-to-pass regression test. Expected outcome: pytest on root-level test_semver.py at 0309c63 returns rc=0; gateway emits [E.tool.pytest.0] clean-pass; pass-2 claim accepted with verification_candidate; ADR-22 hard wall holds.
